name: run_ocr
description: Extract text and structured content from images and documents using optical character recognition. Supports PDF, images, and other document formats, returning extracted text with layout information.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The OCR model ID to use.

parameters.name: document
parameters.description: The document to process. Contains 'type' (image_url or document_url) and the URL or base64 data.

parameters.name: pages
parameters.description: Array of page numbers to process (0-indexed). Processes all pages if omitted.

parameters.name: include_image_base64
parameters.description: Whether to include extracted images as base64 in the response.

pages.markdown:
# Receipt

Total: $42.50
